description: Provides spoken feedback for common editing and clipboard actions.
changelog: Refined smart clipboard feedback for Copy, Cut, and Paste, enabled it by default, improved temporary silence behavior when spoken shortcut feedback is disabled, clarified settings labels and documentation, fixed file count feedback for file copy and cut on NVDA 2026.1, and fixed an issue that could cause Clipboard Announcer to stop working intermittently on NVDA 2026.1.
